Title: Shareable session links and deep-linking support

Description:
Provide stable shareable URLs for sessions and support deep-linking so the UI can open a session detail view from a link. Document steps for Android App Links if mobile packaging is added later.

Why:
Sharing sessions is a common user need; deep-linking improves cross-app integration.

Acceptance criteria:
- Generate stable session URLs (slug or encoded id).
- Clicking a URL opens the session detail in the web UI.
- Add docs describing mobile app link setup (optional).

Labels: enhancement
